instruction: Restore from original source identity; do not auto-delete sources.
Restore from pre-action recovery checkpoint when one exists in Stage 3.6; M1A creates none.
Restore entire SQLite family together from checkpoint/source.
Keep unresolved/non-authoritative; do not promote to live.
No recovery copy required; regenerate ephemeral/disposable at runtime.
Do not invent missing bytes; fail closed if required for live.
